subject: english
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
topic_title: Comprehension: Summarizing in a Specified Number of Words
learning_objectives: Explain summary within a fixed word limit
Condense listed details into broader terms

sections.heading: Guidance
sections.content: The summary must not exceed the specified number of words and should be very brief. A whole passage may be paraphrased into one or two paragraphs.

sections.heading: Examples of Condensation
sections.content: The note shows how a list such as pepper, tomatoes, onion, maggi, salt, and oil can be summarized as 'soup ingredients', while items like cream, lipstick, powder, eye pencil, and hair cream can be summarized as 'cosmetics'.
